name: P.I.E.
description_short: This is a cooking blog featuring pie recipes, not a financial services company. The website URL points to 101 Cookbooks, a food and recipe publication.
description_long:
P.I.E. appears to be a miscategorized entry in the CreditDoc database. The website provided (https://www.101cookbooks.com/pie-recipes/) is a cooking blog post from 101 Cookbooks, a well-known food website that publishes recipes and culinary content. The content consists entirely of pie recipes, baking techniques, and cooking instructions with no financial services, lending products, credit offerings, or payday alternative services of any kind. The page showcases 12 pie recipes ranging from traditional pumpkin and apple pies to savory options like vegetable pot pie and mushroom hand pies, along with detailed instructions for pie crust preparation. There is no mention of loans, credit products, emergency cash, financial counseling, or any regulated financial services. The only commercial element present is a membership offering for 101 Cookbooks premium content, which includes ad-free browsing and downloadable recipe collections. This is entirely incompatible with any consumer finance category and appears to be a data entry error or incorrect URL assignment in the CreditDoc system.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. Credit union installment loans and CDFI products typically offer APRs well below payday rates, with structured repayment over several months.
